author: clthuang
name: Corrupted Context Training + R1-5 Stack (LeakyReLU² + BigramHash + XSA + ValueResidual)
blurb: 11L/3x LeakyReLU(0.5)² + BigramHash(3072,128) + XSA last 4 + Value Residual + U-Net skips + 10% corrupted context training. int8 per-row quantization + zlib compression.
technique_summary: Corrupted context 10% + LeakyReLU² + BigramHash 3072 + XSA4 + Value Residual + Muon + int8+zlib
